之後佢永遠放個比人開到爛既黑行旅箱係後面
我雙唇好乾條女第2日就整個明顯上唔夠粉既樣比我睇
到我依2日唔帶電話出街條女又變
開始西面
尋日換埋件新既好窄好緊既新杉
對眼曚起哂(平時大到你唔信)
姐係處女啦

跟往又係我唔帶電話依幾日
就唔肯出黎
仲搵個男企係面再做個手勢出黎
其實個個都係我面前扮player
我一黎料就現哂型

其實仲有100-200到
好奇妙

尋日有個OK靚仔但比我矮既
應該係條女咁岩請左假左
平時得佢1條女企出面依2日變左4-5個男

My friend Ed is an Aries. He's been having a crush on this girl named Jo for seven years who's a Aquarius. He studied higher diploma in Australia but besides IT he failed all the exams and failed them again in his resits so the government refused to grant a student visa to him again. His great grandfather was granted asylum by the Japanese government during the Cold war. His cousins Tom and Jerry have been accused of robbery. If convicted they would be jailed for two years. The judge granted bail to Tom but refused to grant Jerry bail. Tom's parents have agreed to stand bail for him who's now remanded on bail of ninety thousand dollars while Jerry is remanded in custody for two weeks. Eddie's maid has been stealing money from him. After an investigation he said "She's been stealing money. I'll grant you that" He said his best friend Judy was coming to Hong Kong so he would have her over for a few nights. I said "having her around for a few nights is fair enough but you should let your family know before having her over" My brother too said "I grant that it's very kind of you to have her around but you should let your family know beforehand"
